SHAREHOLDERS AGREEMENT

This Shareholders Agreement (the "Agreement") is made and entered into as of the 1st day of November, 2023, by and among:

1. Dr. John Tan, NRIC No. S2345678B, residing at 123 Orchard Road, #12-34, Singapore 567890, and reachable at +65 9123 4567, email: johntan@example.sg.

2. Ms. Emily Wong, NRIC No. S3456789C, residing at 456 Bukit Timah Road, #03-21, Singapore 678901, and reachable at +65 9876 5432, email: emilywong@example.sg.

3. Tech Innovations Pte. Ltd., UEN: 200312345G, having its registered office at 789 Raffles Place, #10-11, Singapore 048623, and contactable at +65 6222 3344, email: contact@techinnovations.sg.

WHEREAS, the parties hereto have agreed to enter into this Agreement to define their rights and obligations as shareholders of Tech Innovations Pte. Ltd.

WHEREAS, the parties have reviewed the project plan and found that the current project status does not meet the expected milestones.

NOW, THEREFORE, in consideration of the mutual covenants and agreements contained herein, and for other good and valuable consideration, the receipt and sufficiency of which are hereby acknowledged, the parties hereto agree as follows:

1. Purchase and Sale: The total consideration for the shares shall be SGD 1,500,000 (the "SPA"). The purchase shall be executed in accordance with the terms outlined in the SPA.

2. Confidentiality: The parties agree to maintain confidentiality concerning all matters discussed within this Agreement.

For further details, refer to https://example.sg/user/S2345678B.
